## DayZ Server Manager v1.0.2

UI improvements and host-manager fixes since v1.0.1.

### Download

**`dayz_manager-v1.0.2-windows-x64.zip`** — contains:

- `DayZManager.exe`
- `web/` (UI)
- `bercon-cli.exe`
- `config/config-host-template.json`

See [docs/RELEASES.md](https://github.com/devmrbouh-hub/dayz_manager/blob/main/docs/RELEASES.md).

### Highlights

- **Manager logs** — collapsed by default; expand when needed.
- **Open folder** — button on each server card header opens the server root in Windows Explorer.
- **Host fixes since v1.0.1** — runtime hardening, shared Workshop mod cache (`w:{workshop_id}`), late RPT attach.

### Upgrading from v1.0.1

Replace **both** `DayZManager.exe` and the entire `web\` folder. Do not overwrite your working `config\config.json`.
